creator: danny@dannywarren.com
text:
Reviewing as per bug #193693, I propose we mark this RESOLVED/DUPLICATE of bug #177045 (since we want to keep the bug that applies to mail/dspam).

Radim - I am currently compiling a huge rollup patch that includes your fixes, but targeted at mail/dspam so that we can retire mail/dspam-devel.  Thank you!
